_comment: Generic .workflow.json starter — copy to your repo root and replace every TODO. Inert JSON read by the dev-flow runner (NOT consumed by any app build). All hooks are shell commands run from the REPO ROOT; author full paths like 'bash web/scripts/x.sh'. Run 'dev-flow doctor' after editing to validate.
name: TODO-project-name
_comment_deploy: deploy: how a merge reaches prod. One of auto-vercel | ota | native-rebuild | none. auto-vercel = push to main auto-deploys; ota = mobile over-the-air (separate authorization); native-rebuild = needs a native build, hand back to user; none = no deploy trigger.
_comment_packageManager: packageManager: OPTIONAL. Remove this line to infer from lockfile (bun.lock->bun, pnpm-lock.yaml->pnpm, package-lock.json->npm, yarn.lock->yarn). When several match, precedence is bun>pnpm>npm>yarn and repo root beats web/; set this explicitly in a monorepo whose app lives in web/. One of bun | pnpm | npm | yarn.
_comment_hooks: hooks: shell commands run from REPO ROOT. Only 'gate' is required.

hooks._comment_prep: prep: OPTIONAL. Bootstrap a fresh worktree (repo-specific extras only — dev-up already does generic env-seed+install). Absent => rely on dev-up. Delete this line if unused.
hooks._comment_gate: gate: REQUIRED. Full local confidence gate. Nonzero exit = DO NOT ship.
hooks._comment_smoke: smoke: OPTIONAL. Read-only post-deploy prod smoke. Delete this line if unused.
hooks._comment_gc: gc: OPTIONAL. Prune landed worktrees. Absent => fall back to dev-up's generic worktrees-gc.sh. Delete this line if unused.

_comment_content: content: OPTIONAL. User-facing surfaces to refresh on user-visible ships. Delete this block if unused.
_comment_repro: repro: OPTIONAL hints for the reasoning layer. surface: web | expo | rn. Delete this block if unused.
